claims.text: Label projection is an effective technique for cross-lingual transfer.
claims.source_quote: Label projection is an effective technique for cross-lingual transfer, extending span-annotated datasets from a high-resource language to low-resource ones.

claims.text: Most approaches perform label projection as a separate step after machine translation.
claims.source_quote: Most approaches perform label projection as a separate step after machine translation...

claims.text: Prior work that combines translation and label projection reports degraded translation quality.
claims.source_quote: ...and prior work that combines the two reports degraded translation quality.

claims.text: LabelPigeon is a novel framework that jointly performs translation and label projection via XML tags.
claims.source_quote: We re-evaluate this claim with LabelPigeon, a novel framework that jointly performs translation and label projection via XML tags.

claims.text: LabelPigeon outperforms baselines and actively improves translation quality in 11 languages.
claims.source_quote: ...and find that LabelPigeon outperforms baselines and actively improves translation quality in 11 languages.

claims.text: Translation quality is assessed across 203 languages and varying annotation complexity.
claims.source_quote: We further assess translation quality across 203 languages and varying annotation complexity...

claims.text: Consistent improvement in translation quality is attributed to additional fine-tuning.
claims.source_quote: ...finding consistent improvement attributed to additional fine-tuning.

claims.text: Substantial gains in cross-lingual transfer are reported across 27 languages and three downstream tasks, up to +39.9 F1 on NER.
claims.source_quote: Finally, across 27 languages and three downstream tasks, we report substantial gains in cross-lingual transfer over comparable work, up to +39.9 F1 on NER.

claims.text: XML-tagged label projection provides effective and efficient label transfer without compromising translation quality.
claims.source_quote: Overall, our results demonstrate that XML-tagged label projection provides effective and efficient label transfer without compromising translation quality.
